---
title: "ENVS-193DS_homework-03"
author: "Henderson Vo"
date: "2026-03-02"
format: 
  html:
    toc: TRUE
execute:
  messages: FALSE
  warnings: FALSE
---
[Github repository](https://github.com/hendersonvo/ENVS-193DS_homework-03#)

# Set up
```{r}
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

# read data
salinity <- read_csv(here("data", "salinity-pickleweed.csv"))
```
